dashboard.label: Kill-Chain Incident Timeline
dashboard.description: Multi-stage attack correlation view. Each incident_id groups a complete kill-chain execution. Drill into any incident for full stage-by-stage forensics.

search.query: `acme_genai_index` `acme_last_24h` incident_id=* testbed_mode=KILL_CHAIN_ACTIVE | stats dc(incident_id) as count
`acme_genai_index` `acme_last_24h` incident_id=* testbed_mode=KILL_CHAIN_ACTIVE | stats count by incident_id | stats max(count) as max_stages
`acme_genai_index` `acme_last_24h` incident_id=* testbed_mode=KILL_CHAIN_ACTIVE | stats max(framework.cvss_score) as max_cvss | eval max_cvss=round(max_cvss,1)
`acme_genai_index` `acme_last_24h` incident_id=* testbed_mode=KILL_CHAIN_ACTIVE | stats dc(agent.id) as count

`acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ incident_id=* testbed_mode=KILL_CHAIN_ACTIVE scenario_family=$scenario_family$ | timechart dc(incident_id) as incidents span=30m

chart.title: Chain Stages by Kill-Chain Stage Type

search.query: `acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ incident_id=* testbed_mode=KILL_CHAIN_ACTIVE | stats count by framework.kill_chain_stage | sort -count

table.title: Incident Summary — Click Incident ID to drill into stages

search.query: `acme_genai_index` earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ incident_id=$incident_filter$ testbed_mode=KILL_CHAIN_ACTIVE scenario_family=$scenario_family$ | stats values(chain_name) AS chain_name, values(scenario_family) AS family, dc(framework.technique_id) AS stages_fired, values(framework.technique_id) AS technique_chain, dc(framework.kill_chain_stage) AS kill_chain_stages, dc(agent.id) AS agents_involved, values(agent.id) AS agent_list, max(framework.cvss_score) AS max_cvss, min(_time) AS chain_start, max(_time) AS chain_end BY incident_id | eval dwell_seconds=round(chain_end-chain_start,0) | eval dwell_str=if(dwell_seconds<60,dwell_seconds."s",round(dwell_seconds/60,1)."m") | eval max_cvss=round(max_cvss,1) | eval severity=case(max_cvss>=9.0,"🔴 CRITICAL",max_cvss>=7.0,"🟠 HIGH",max_cvss>=4.0,"🟡 MEDIUM",1=1,"🟢 LOW") | eval technique_chain_str=mvjoin(technique_chain," → ") | eval agent_str=mvjoin(agent_list," | ") | convert ctime(chain_start) | sort -chain_start | table incident_id chain_name family severity stages_fired kill_chain_stages max_cvss dwell_str agents_involved agent_str technique_chain_str chain_start | rename incident_id AS "Incident ID", chain_name AS "Scenario", family AS "Family", severity AS "Severity", stages_fired AS "Stages", kill_chain_stages AS "Kill-Chain Stages", max_cvss AS "Max CVSS", dwell_str AS "Dwell Time", agents_involved AS "Agents", agent_str AS "Agent IDs", technique_chain_str AS "Technique Chain", chain_start AS "Start Time"

`acme_genai_index` incident_id="$selected_incident$" | sort stage_num | eval stage_num=if(isnull(stage_num),"?",stage_num) | table _time stage_num stage_name framework.technique_id framework.technique_name framework.tactic_name framework.kill_chain_stage framework.severity framework.cvss_score agent.id defenseclaw_action framework.detection_signal | rename _time AS "Time", stage_num AS "Stage", stage_name AS "Stage Name", framework.technique_id AS "Technique ID", framework.technique_name AS "Technique", framework.tactic_name AS "Tactic", framework.kill_chain_stage AS "Kill-Chain Stage", framework.severity AS "Severity", framework.cvss_score AS "CVSS", agent.id AS "Agent", defenseclaw_action AS "DefenseClaw", framework.detection_signal AS "Detection Signal"

html.h3: Splunk correlation search for this incident
html.p: Copy this SPL into Search to replay the full incident timeline:

pre.code: sourcetype="otel:agentic:json" incident_id="$selected_incident$" | table _time stage_num stage_name framework.technique_id framework.severity defenseclaw_action agent.id | sort stage_num
